trade_plans.entry_trigger: Price enters entry zone ($8.31-$8.38) and shows bullish candlestick confirmation on 15m/30m timeframe.
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (Long/Short ratio 6th percentile) - contrarian bullish
Price above EMA20, EMA50, EMA200 - bullish momentum
Positive funding rate (longs paying shorts) - bullish sentiment

trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Multiple bullish signals (extreme short crowd, EMA alignment, positive funding, FGI) suggest a higher probability of success, but weak buying volume and accelerating negative funding velocity introduce some caution, leading to a 62% win rate estimate.
